fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Arkansas Audiologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a audiologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Arkansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: audiologist license reciprocity arkansas, how to transfer audiologist license to arkansas, audiologist compact arkansas, arkansas audiologist endorsement application

board.name: Arkansas Board of Examiners in Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
board.mailing_address: ABESPA, P.O. Box 2011, Little Rock, AR 72203-2011
board.physical_address: 101 E. Capitol Ave., Suite 211, Little Rock, AR 72201

license_types.title: AuD, CCC-A
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a audiologist in Arkansas.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.description: Register for a new account on the ABESPA Licensing Portal by clicking 'Register for a New Account' on the login page and following the prompts.

steps.title: Complete Online Application
steps.description: Log in to your newly created account on the ABESPA Licensing Portal and complete the Audiologist Licensure Application.

steps.title: Pay Application and Licensure Fees
steps.description: Pay the non-refundable $100 application fee and the $100 initial licensure fee through the ABESPA Licensing Portal.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official graduate transcripts, reflecting your Master's or Doctoral degree in audiology, to be sent directly from your university to ABESPA.

steps.title: Submit Praxis Scores
steps.description: Arrange for official Praxis II Audiology (5030) examination scores to be sent directly from ETS to ABESPA.

steps.title: Provide Verification (Endorsement)
steps.description: For endorsement, provide verification of licensure in good standing from all states where you have previously held a license, or submit proof of your ASHA Certificate of Clinical Competence in Audiology (CCC-A).

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the Praxis. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Arkansas audiologist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the Praxis Exam in Audiology is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Arkansas have reciprocity for audiologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Arkansas participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Arkansas without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my audiologist license to Arkansas?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Arkansas while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Audiologists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Audiologist in Arkansas
hero.dek: To apply for an Audiologist license in Arkansas, you must submit your application and supporting documents through the ABESPA Licensing Portal.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the ABESPA Licensing Portal URL and click 'Register for a New Account'. Follow the prompts to create your username and password.
